summary: Tested React Hooks bug fix in CourseOutputView and Videocorso endpoints. Bug fix verified - useState hooks are now correctly placed BEFORE conditional return. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend VideocorsoPage loads without React errors, displays admin panoramic view, course output view, completed banner, and 4 modules correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug fix verified: useState hooks in CourseOutputView (lines 467-468) are now correctly placed BEFORE the conditional return (line 470). This follows React's rules of hooks.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All UI elements rendering correctly, no React hooks errors)

seed_data_creation: Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has videocorso generated and approved with 4 modules
context_for_next_testing_agent: React hooks bug fix verified. CourseOutputView useState hooks are now before conditional return. Partner 2 has course_approved=true so completed banner is shown. The 'Aggiungi modulo' and 'Aggiungi lezione' buttons only appear when editable=true (partner view with !isCompleted && courseData exists). Since partner 2 has course_approved=true, these buttons are not shown.

features_tested.Bug fix: React Hook useState conditional: PASS - useState hooks now before conditional return
features_tested.Frontend VideocorsoPage: admin view for: PASS - Admin panoramic view, course output view, 4 modules displayed
features_tested.Frontend VideocorsoPage: completed banne: PASS - 'Videocorso completato!' banner with 'Vai al Funnel' button
features_tested.Backend POST /api/partner-journey/videoc: PASS - Accepts partner_id, durata, include_bonus, contenuti_pronti

CourseOutputView_bug_fix.before: useState was called AFTER conditional return (if (!courseData) return null)
CourseOutputView_bug_fix.after: useState is now called BEFORE conditional return - lines 467-468 have useState, line 470 has conditional return

editable_buttons_logic.description: 'Aggiungi modulo' and 'Aggiungi lezione' buttons only appear when editable prop is true
editable_buttons_logic.condition: editable is passed only when !isCompleted && courseData exists (partner view)
editable_buttons_logic.partner_2_status: course_approved=true means isCompleted=true, so editable buttons are NOT shown (expected behavior)
